seo.title: Pricing | Whiteintel Dark Web Monitoring & Threat Intelligence
seo.description: Simple, transparent pricing for Whiteintel's dark web monitoring and threat intelligence platform. Find the right plan for your team or enterprise.
seo.heroDescription: At Whiteintel, we believe in clarity. Our pricing is fair, consistent, and designed to scale with your security needs.

features.searchConsumerCorporate: Search by consumer, corporate, email, and attack surface identifiers
features.10exports: 10 data exports per month (2-month look-back window)
features.directContentAccess: Direct content access for watchlist events
features.lookalikeDetection: Look-alike domain detection for domain identifiers
features.computerNameIP: Computer name and IP address identifiers
features.resaleRights: Resale or customer-facing product integration rights
features.searchAllCore: Search by all core identifiers (consumer, corporate, email, attack surface)
features.10exportsDay: 10 data exports per day (1-year look-back window)
features.64watchlist: 64 watchlist tokens for domains and emails with real-time alerts
features.darkweb8keywords: Dark Web mention monitoring for 8 keywords
features.github8repos: Public GitHub repository scanning for 8 repositories
features.searchAllIdentifiers: All search identifiers included (domains, emails, IPs, computer names, etc.)
features.500exportsDay: 500 data exports per day (2-year look-back window)
features.128watchlist: 128 watchlist tokens for all identifiers (domains, emails, IPs, computer names) with real-time alerts
features.darkweb16keywords: Dark Web mention monitoring for 16 keywords
features.github16repos: Public GitHub repository scanning for 16 repositories
features.resaleCustomerRights: Resale and customer-facing product integration rights
